room.caption: [G1-11] I really like the Volcano Lotus here.
room.creationCode:
if global.gameProgress=410 global.gameProgress=420
backFollowFore=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollowFore.type=2 backFollowFore.backSet=backMarioA backFollowFore.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollowFore.yMoveScale=1 backFollowFore.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(101) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
